case_title: BARNETT, EVA L vs. HYSON, MARTIN LUTHER et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $107.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARNETT, EVA L AS TO DEFENDANT HYSON, MARTIN LUTHER
